tasks.query: REPLICATE [db2].[newtable1] WITH maxparallelpartitions = '2', enableparallelreadpartitioning = 'true', IncrementalCheckColumns = 'id', partitionsize = '180' SELECT * FROM [dbo].[newtable1]

REPLICATE [db2].[employees2] WITH maxparallelpartitions = '2', enableparallelreadpartitioning = 'true', IncrementalCheckColumns = 'id', partitionsize = '180' SELECT ISNULL([id], 10) AS [id], [age], [name] FROM [dbo].[employees2]
